responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Complete final production closeout for IVX Holdings: resolve all 8 blockers, deploy fixes, verify production, and certify

## Constraints & Preferences
- Store ALL timestamps in UTC only; convert to local only for display
- Owner account must NEVER sign in automatically — manual email + password required on every launch
- App colors must match landing page — `#FFD700` gold, `#00C48C` green, `#FF4D4D` red, `#4A90D9` blue
- Do not change Android package name (`com.ivxholdings.app`) or iOS bundle identifier
- Do not create new project, replace IVX, reset repo, switch to localhost, or add Rork dependencies
- Landing QA: do not mark production ready because routes return 200; require live evidence
- Do not write COMPLETE, CERTIFIED, VERIFIED or FINAL until every required QA item passes
- If real-device test cannot be performed, report: BLOCKED — REAL DEVICE QA NOT EXECUTED
- CORS must allow only: `https://ivxholding.com`, `https://www.ivxholding.com`, `https://chat.ivxholding.com`, approved local dev origins
- Use `bun x` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- EAS credentials (`EXPO_TOKEN`, `EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID`) NOT available — building APK locally with Gradle instead
- Reels refactor: only 1 active player, max 3 mounted (active ± 1), 80% viewability threshold
- NEVER ask user for credentials — find them in the project or work around the blocker
- Autonomous dashboard: never fabricate activity; every item must have real evidence; show IDLE if no task executing
- Status must be `QA IN PROGRESS` until ALL required items pass including real-device QA, screen recordings, and CloudFront invalidation
- expo-file-system v19 uses `File`/`Directory` classes; legacy API available via `expo-file-system/legacy` import
- Android Gradle build requires `--no-watch-fs` flag (Watchman gets stuck in sandbox)

## Progress
### Done
- **17-section IVX Holdings production QA audit COMPLETED** — full evidence-based audit written to `qa-evidence/FINAL_OWNERSHIP_QA_AUDIT.md`
- **`IVX_DISASTER_RECOVERY.md` CREATED** at project root — 16-step clean-room recovery procedure, env var inventory, service inventory, deployment runbook, rollback procedure
- **Rork dependency audit: ZERO runtime dependencies confirmed**: `@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk` removed, `withRorkMetro` removed, `rork.json` absent, URL guard blocks `*.rork.com`
- **GitHub repo**: `ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest`, branch `main`. Git remote through `rork-git-router.rork-direct.workers.dev` as transport proxy
- **Git sync RESOLVED**: Local HEAD = GitHub HEAD = `31dc37dffce130e1aac0b35786ea1b2857f6fa0f` — all commits synced, zero unpushed
- **CORS wildcard FIXED (Phase 5)**: 3 locations changed from `*` to `https://ivxholding.com` — `backend/hono.ts` line 5071, `backend/api/ivx-owner-action-requests.ts` lines 348 & 356. Verified live: evil origin rejected (no ACAO header), approved origin gets `access-control-allow-origin: https://ivxholding.com`
- **Dashboard export IMPLEMENTED (Phase 7)**: New file `expo/src/modules/ivx-owner-ai/services/ivxDashboardExport.ts` — CSV/JSON/PDF export for 10 report types (daily_activities, agent_performance, code_commits, deployments, investors, buyers_crm, failures_retries, owner_actions, evidence_ledger, executive_summary). Export UI added to `expo/app/ivx/autonomous-ops.tsx` with format/report selection, owner-only, investor PII redacted
- **TypeScript: Both frontend and backend compile with 0 errors**. Fixed 4 pre-existing backend TS errors: `awsRegion` variable order in `ivx-landing-full-deploy.ts`, `VideoMeta.title` cast in `ivx-video-platform.ts`, block status comparison in `ivx-task-state-store.ts`, `@ts-expect-error` directive in `ivx-time-service.ts`
- **iOS bundle ID FIXED**: Changed from `app.rork.r64gj6i3shhxqnlbhiewv` to `com.ivxholdings.app` in `ios-ivx/Ivx.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj` (all 6 occurrences including tests/uitests)
- **Analytics infrastructure AUDITED and EXPANDED**: Landing page already has Google Ads/GA4, Meta Pixel, TikTok Pixel, LinkedIn Insight Tag (all conditionally loaded via env var IDs). Added reel engagement events to `ivx-reels.js`: reel_view, reel_complete, reel_like, reel_comment, reel_share, reel_save. Added registration_start to `index.html`. Total: 12 first-party events, 5 ad platform events, 4 reel events
- **Android versionCode incremented**: 4→5 in `expo/app.config.ts` for fresh build
- **Lint passes**: 0 errors, 10 warnings (unused imports only) in changed files
- **Registration re-verified**: New QA member `e98b44a6-734e-40e5-90cc-8b5bf9728c66` created successfully via live API
- **Production regression ALL PASS (Phase 10)**: 10/10 public routes 200 (/health, /readiness, /version, /diagnostics, /api/reels, /api/properties, /api/deals, /api/members/authoritative-count, /api/metrics/authoritative-count, /api/landing-config), 4/4 protected routes 401, 2/2 chat routes 200, landing live with correct title/canonical/colors, reels feed 6 videos unified, member count
